title: Leo
description: Topics referred to by the same term
extract:
Leo is the Latin word for lion. It most often refers to:Leo (constellation), a constellation of stars in the night sky
Leo (astrology), an astrological sign of the zodiac
Leo, a given name in several languages, usually masculine
extract_html:
Leo is the Latin word for lion. It most often refers to:

  • Leo (constellation), a constellation of stars in the night sky
  • Leo (astrology), an astrological sign of the zodiac
  • Leo, a given name in several languages, usually masculine
